title: lepidotis diffusa
intro: Lepidotis diffusa, also known as American coltsfoot or lungwort, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. The plant's leaves contain compounds with medicinal properties, including saponins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Lepidotis diffusa has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to soothe sore throats and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lepidotis diffusa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its health benefits.
